item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, ini tidak berarti hak individu selalu dilupakan; kita juga menghargai kebebasan pribadi dalam batasan yang sehat.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that society is often prioritized in Indonesia, then shifts toward a balanced position emphasizing that individual rights are not always forgotten and that the balance is context-specific. Agent B consistently prioritizes individual constitutional protections, while allowing that public policy can support social justice when clear limits protect personal rights.
